record.field: [ {"date": "2025-10-12", "name": "Día de la Resistencia Indígena"}, {"date": "2025-12-25", "name": "Navidad"}, {"date": "2026-01-01", "name": "Año Nuevo"}, {"date": "2026-02-16", "name": "Carnaval"}, {"date": "2026-02-17", "name": "Carnaval"}, {"date": "2026-04-02", "name": "Jueves Santo"}, {"date": "2026-04-03", "name": "Viernes Santo"}, {"date": "2026-04-19", "name": "Declaración de Independencia"}, {"date": "2026-05-01", "name": "Día del Trabajador"}, {"date": "2026-06-24", "name": "Batalla de Carabobo"}, {"date": "2026-07-05", "name": "Día de la Independencia"}, {"date": "2026-07-24", "name": "Natalicio de Simón Bolívar"} ]
